---
title: "My ceramics journey!"
format: html
categories: [Past ceramics work]
image: ceramics2.png
draft: false
---

Here is some of my past ceramics work!

2023:

![](ceramics2.png){width="300px"}

![](ceramics1.png){width="300px"}

![](ceramics3.png){width="300px"}

![](ceramics4.png){width="300px"}

![](ceramics5.png){width="300px"}

![](ceramics6.png){width="300px"}

![](ceramics7.png){width="300px"}

![](ceramics8.png){width="300px"}

![](ceramics9.png){width="300px"}

![](ceramics10.png){width="300px"}
